text:
Lisa is one of the three cosplayers disguised as the Colossus Titan in Attack on Demoncon, the tenth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Lisa has blonde hair tied in a high ponytail, fair skin and blue eyes. During the convention, she wears a leotard representing the Colossus Titan upper body and a matching mask.

Story

Along with her friends Priyanka and Sakura, Lisa is at the Demoncon, cosplaying as the Colossus Titan. Before the start, she is in an elevator and contemplates the crowd gathered. She cheers Priyanka, who feels nervous, and advises her to act as if she was an actual Colossus Titan. The three then pose as others photograph them.

The three ladies then come across a group of four men dressed as Survey Corps members. One of them, Gin, comes close to Lisa. He introduces himself to Lisa and attempts to grope her from behind. Alarmed by the feel of a hand, Lisa turns around and slaps him. Their respective friends intervene and Lisa complains about Gin having grabby hands and is enraged.

Imagining she is the Colossus Titan, she beats Gin and his friends who tried to defend him. Being snapped out of her fantasy, she triumphantly looks at the three injured men laying on the floor.
